CustomField.description: Denormalized "Region - Customer Segment" string (e.g. "NAMER - Enterprise"), a denormalized routing key used for territory-style routing. Kept in sync by the Account trigger when Region__c or Customer_Segment__c changes.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-stamped territory string in the form "Region - Segment". Do not edit manually; updated by the Account trigger.
CustomField.label: Territory Segment
